column1: SwCType: AtomicSwComponentType  |  Safety: ASIL-B  |  Cycles: Init (once) | 100 µs (TimingEvent = 10 kHz inner loop)  |  Purpose: Inner PI current control loop — regulates Id and Iq via decoupled PI + voltage limiting

column15: Description
d-axis stator current feedback from ADC/Clarke-Park transform
q-axis stator current feedback from ADC/Clarke-Park transform

column14: MTPA SWC or tied to 0 for SPMSM
column15: d-axis current reference; 0 for SPMSM; MTPA-computed for IPMSM
q-axis current reference from speed controller
DC bus voltage measurement for voltage normalisation in PI output
d-axis voltage command to PWM/SVM block after PI + decoupling
q-axis voltage command to PWM/SVM block after PI + decoupling
Timing Budget

column13: Set IdIntgState=0, IqIntgState=0, VdCmd=0, VqCmd=0. Cache CalPrm to locals.
column15: <50 µs

column7: KpId, KiId, KpIq, KiIq, VdcNom, VoltLim, Ld, Lq, Rs
column13:
1. Read IdFbk, IqFbk (sint16 → float32 via ×0.01)
2. Read IqRef (float32), IdRef (sint16→float32)
3. Compute errors: idErr=IdRef-IdFbk; iqErr=IqRef-IqFbk
4. d-axis PI: Vd = KpId*idErr + IdIntg; IdIntg+=KiId*idErr*100e-6
5. q-axis PI: Vq = KpIq*iqErr + IqIntg; IqIntg+=KiIq*iqErr*100e-6
6. Decoupling FF: Vd -= omega*Lq*IqFbk; Vq += omega*Ld*IdFbk
7. Voltage circle limiting: if |Vdq|>VoltLim*Vdc/sqrt(3) → scale down
8. Convert float Vd/Vq → sint16 (×100) and write ports
column15: <30 µs
column16: 10 kHz — tightest timing constraint in system. No dynamic memory.

column15: Impact if Wrong
Low: slow Id tracking. High: oscillation — motor may destabilize

column14: I-gain for d-axis PI; per 100µs sample
column15: Too high: integrator diverges. Too low: steady-state Id error
Low: slow torque response. High: oscillation
column16: Usually same as KpId for SPMSM

column14: I-gain for q-axis PI; per 100µs sample
column15: Too high: torque ripple / oscillation

column14: Nominal Vdc used for normalisation; not measured value
column15: Wrong value → incorrect per-unit scaling of voltage commands

column14: Fraction of Vdc/√3 used as voltage limit circle radius
column15: Too high: overmodulation. Too low: reduced torque capability

column14: d-axis inductance for cross-coupling decoupling feedforward
column15: Wrong: residual cross-coupling oscillation

column14: q-axis inductance for cross-coupling decoupling feedforward
column15: Wrong: cross-coupling oscillation at high speed

column14: Stator resistance for back-EMF compensation at low speed
column15: Wrong: steady-state voltage offset at low speed

column8: Protects IdIntgState and IqIntgState against concurrent access
column13: Not strictly needed if 100µs is only runnable — but kept for future-proofing
